description_long: This is a plush, anthropomorphic figure with a rounded, egg-shaped body covered in a beige, burlap-like fabric. Its face features two simple, round black eyes and a thin, straight stitched mouth, giving it a neutral and calm expression. The arms are short and cylindrical, attached at the sides, and the hands are minimally defined with slight finger separations. The legs are short and stubby, providing a stable base for the figure to stand upright. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible clothing, accessories, or additional features. The texture of the surface is visibly coarse, resembling woven fabric, and the toy appears soft and squeezable.
description: A beige, burlap-textured stuffed toy with a rounded body, simple black eyes, and a stitched mouth. It has short arms and legs, giving it a minimalist and soft appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face with two black eyes and a stitched mouth, as well as both arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded profile, the arm extending downward, and the lack of facial features on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, with no facial features and both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm and the rounded contour of the body, with a partial view of the face.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with two round black eyes and a straight stitched mouth, giving it a calm and expressionless appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides and legs slightly apart, the head and body are aligned vertically.
